title: Statistical Learning
desc: Supervised vs unsupervised, prediction vs inference, reducible vs irreducible error

desc: The fundamental tension between model flexibility and generalization

title: EDA & Data Profiling
desc: ydata-profiling, missing data, distributions, correlation — before modeling

title: Linear Regression
desc: OLS, RSE, R², F-statistic, confidence intervals, categorical predictors

title: Regularization (Ridge & Lasso)
desc: Shrinkage methods, L1 vs L2 penalties, the bias-variance trade, cross-validated λ

title: Subset & Model Selection
desc: Best subset, forward/backward stepwise, Cp, BIC, adjusted R²

title: Beyond Linearity
desc: Polynomial regression, step functions, splines, local regression, GAMs

title: Logistic Regression
desc: Log-odds, sigmoid, MLE, confusion matrix, ROC/AUC, multinomial extension

title: LDA & QDA
desc: Linear and quadratic discriminant analysis, Bayes classifier, decision boundaries

title: Naive Bayes
desc: Conditional independence assumption, Gaussian NB, text classification use cases

title: K-Nearest Neighbors
desc: Distance-based classification, choosing K, curse of dimensionality

title: Decision Trees
desc: Recursive binary splitting, Gini impurity, pruning, regression vs classification trees

title: Random Forests
desc: Bagging, random feature selection, OOB error, variable importance

title: Boosting
desc: AdaBoost, gradient boosting, XGBoost intuition, shrinkage, tree depth

title: Support Vector Machines
desc: Maximal margin classifier, support vectors, kernels (RBF, poly), soft margin

title: Principal Component Analysis
desc: Variance maximization, loadings, scree plot, proportion of variance explained

title: K-Means Clustering
desc: Lloyd's algorithm, elbow method, silhouette score, initialization sensitivity

title: Hierarchical Clustering
desc: Agglomerative clustering, linkage methods, dendrograms, cutting the tree

title: Neural Networks & Deep Learning
desc: Forward pass, backprop, activations, dropout, CNNs and RNNs intuition

title: Survival Analysis
desc: Censoring, Kaplan-Meier estimator, log-rank test, Cox proportional hazards

title: Multiple Testing
desc: FWER, Bonferroni correction, false discovery rate, Benjamini-Hochberg

title: Model Explainability (SHAP & LIME)
desc: SHAP values, LIME, partial dependence plots, stakeholder communication

title: LazyPredict Benchmarking
desc: Benchmark 30+ models in one call — rapid baseline comparison

title: Time Series Foundations
desc: Trend, seasonality, cycles, STL decomposition, ACF/PACF, time plots

title: Forecasting Methods (ETS & ARIMA)
desc: Naive baselines, Holt-Winters ETS, ARIMA, auto_arima, MAE/RMSE evaluation

title: Advanced Forecasting
desc: Prophet, LSTM for sequences, cross-validation for time series, ensembles

title: Bayesian Thinking
desc: Prior, likelihood, posterior, credible intervals vs confidence intervals
